docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER ANDERSON, LARRY DALE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PETITIONER ANDERSON, LARRY DALE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER ANDERSON, LARRY DALE HEARING SET FOR NOV-22-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 514

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PETITIONER ANDERSON, LARRY DALE HEARING SET FOR OCT-12-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PETITIONER ANDERSON, LARRY DALE

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-12-2011 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER LARRY ANDERSON'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF NOV-22-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME OFF CALENDAR. PLAINTIFF APPEARED TODAY WITH NO PROOF OF PUBLICATION. PLAINTIFF STATED THAT PROOF OF PUBLICATION WAS FILED WITH THE COURT THREE WEEKS AGO. PLAINTIFF LEFT TO GET A COPY AND DID NOT RETURN BY THE TIME CASE WAS CALLED. JUDGE: JAMES ROBERTSON. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (514)
